creator: gabriel_ambuehl@buz.ch
text:
The FTP proxy which is used to enable FTP for people behind NAT gateways seems to be partly broken as it won't work with browsers and other clients that use passive connections.

Fix: 

The bug was fixed in IPFilter 3.4.9 or .10 (but since 3.4.11 is available, I'd prefer the merge of that one ;-).
How-To-Repeat: Try to connect to an FTP server through ipnat using a browser/passive client.
